tasks.description: Reproduce the referenced CRSI-Core chain summary and verify that the recorded successor-package hash chain is internally consistent.
tasks.measurement: offline reproduction report ok flag and hash consistency evidence

tasks.description: Audit that RCP and RCLM certificate bundles are preserved for every package in the recorded chain.
tasks.measurement: certificate_preserved, rcp_checker_passed, rclm_checker_passed, and LECert FullPass evidence

tasks.description: Verify no-leakage, no-oracle, and no-manual-repair flags for the external bridge and the underlying CRSI packages.
Check that the external score ledger entries match the CRSI successor IDs in order and that the score sequence is monotone non-decreasing with strict improvement.
Produce a compact research-engineering evidence package that binds task manifest, scorer artifact, score ledger, CRSI chain hash, and bridge sidecar hash.
tasks.measurement: presence and hashes of task_manifest, scorer_artifact, score_ledger, sidecar, reproduction report
